vibe: Professional, clear, trustworthy, warm, modern, conversion-focused

background.description: Warm off-white, acts as the primary canvas to avoid stark clinical white.

surface.description: Used for cards, navigation, and alternating full-width sections.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green. Trustworthy, growth-oriented, highly professional. Used for primary CTAs and key brand moments.

secondary.description: Deep warm slate/charcoal. Used for secondary buttons and high-contrast text.

accent.description: Warm Terracotta/Ochre. Used sparingly for overlines, subtle highlights, and micro-interactions.

fonts.heading: font-sans (Outfit or Cabinet Grotesk recommended, fallback to system sans)
fonts.mono: font-mono (JetBrains Mono for technical snippets if any)

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-medium text-stone-900
scales.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-medium text-stone-900

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-xl for large cards, rounded-lg for buttons/inputs
spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-sm for subtle depth on cards, shadow-md for hover states, avoid heavy drop shadows to prevent SaaS look.

header_and_navigation.desktop: Sticky at top, z-50. bg-stone-50/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200. Logo on left, links center, CTA right. Links should be text-stone-600 hover:text-stone-900 transition-colors.
header_and_navigation.mobile: Hamburger menu opening a full-screen or side drawer (use Shadcn Sheet) with large text links.

footer.style: bg-stone-900 text-stone-400 py-20. Headings text-white. Subtle top border if needed.

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-800 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all hover:bg-emerald-900 hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-stone-900 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all hover:bg-stone-800
buttons.outline: border border-stone-300 text-stone-900 bg-transparent rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all hover:border-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50
buttons.ghost: text-stone-600 hover:text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.service_card: bg-white p-8 rounded-xl border border-stone-200 hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300. Use left alignment, icon on top left, clear H4 heading, body text, and ghost button 'Learn more ->'.
cards.article_card: Vertical layout. Image container max-h-48 overflow-hidden rounded-t-xl. Body p-6 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-b-xl. Category overline, H4 title, short excerpt, date.
cards.feature_block: Large side-by-side layout (Image on one side, text on other). Reverse alternating rows.

forms.style: Minimalist and trustworthy. Use Shadcn Form/Input components but style with border-stone-300 focus:border-emerald-800 focus:ring-emerald-800. bg-white.
forms.contact_form: Two-column layout on desktop. Include fields for Enquiry Type (Select) and a clear CTA.

trust_and_testimonials.style: Clean, large typography. Avoid 'SaaS review widget' look. Use a large blockquote `text-2xl font-light italic text-stone-900`, followed by author name and role. Optional: company logos in a slow marquee below the hero.
trust_and_testimonials.logo_cloud: Grayscale logos with opacity-50 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity.

hero_sections.style: High impact, clear value prop. Split layout (Text left, image right) OR Center aligned text with a massive 16:9 image below it. H1 should be outcome-focused. Two CTAs (Primary & Outline).
hero_sections.overlay: If using a background image hero, use bg-stone-900/60 overlay to ensure text contrast.

image_urls.description: Wide-angle architectural office. Perfect for Home Hero or About Hero.
Warm abstract architectural detail. Great for CTA section backgrounds or value prop grids.
Hands on laptop and documents. Ideal for Services or Contact page.
Diverse team collaborating. Use for About Us or Trust blocks.
Professional working on a laptop. Good for Application/Offers/DocuShare teaser sections.
Two professionals collaborating on a laptop. Perfect for Resource Hub or specific service pages.

media.icons: Use `lucide-react` for crisp, consistent line icons. Keep stroke-width to 1.5 for a premium feel.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons should elevate slightly (-translate-y-[1px]) and cards should gain a subtle shadow-md on hover. Links should underline or change color.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade up elements on scroll using Framer Motion (opacity 0 to 1, y: 20 to 0). Keep it elegant and fast (0.4s). No bouncy spring animations.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure all focus states use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-800 focus:ring-offset-2.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case representing its role. Examples: `data-testid="primary-cta-button"`, `data-testid="contact-form-submit"`, `data-testid="service-card-learn-more"`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use a typical SaaS dashboard look. Avoid small dense metric cards, sidebar navigations, and excessive use of generic blue gradients.
Prioritize large typography, generous white space (p-20/p-32), and clear readable text.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural marketing layouts (Heroes, Grids, Trust Blocks). Only use Shadcn for complex interactive components (Forms, Select, Dialogs, Accordions).
Alternate section backgrounds between bg-stone-50 and bg-white to create rhythm.
Always apply the provided `data-testid` attributes to all buttons, links, and form elements.
Do NOT use placeholder text for images. Use the provided image URLs in the media section.
For the Header, implement a sticky navbar with glassmorphism over scrolling content.
For the Footer, use a dark theme (bg-stone-900) to anchor the page.
Ensure all contrast ratios exceed WCAG AA standards. Never put white text over a light image without a dark overlay.
